name: Broken Scepter
description: A shattered talisman of the Grineer Elder Queen. It pulls health orbs from deceased enemies and energy orbs from destroyed robots.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A shattered talisman of the Grineer Elder Queen. It pulls health orbs from deceased enemies and energy orbs from destroyed robots.

drops.location: Cephalon Simaris, Complete The War Within

components.name: Kuva
components.description:
Kuva is an exceedingly rare red fluid coveted by the Grineer Queens. It can be obtained in Kuva Missions, and is used to Cycle Rivens or build rare blueprints.

Location: Kuva Siphon Missions and Taveuni (Kuva Fortress)

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when using the Broken Scepter.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.2 (Phase One: DB Upgrades)
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script errors in Broken Scepter and Ivara Quiver with null avatar.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Improved the ability for Hosts using the Broken Scepter to find and drain enemies killed and ragdolled by Clients. The nearest ragdolled and killed enemy will be flagged.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Broken Scepter in The War Within not inheriting player colours. 
Fixed drain effect and color from Broken Scepter not showing on enemies burned by Ember. 
Fixed a script error that would destroy enemies ragdolled by Broken Scepter.
